Cookie.message: We use essential cookies to keep the site working. We may use additional analytics cookies only with your consent.

HomePage.meta_title: VeryMuch.ai — AI Agents for Sales & Marketing
HomePage.meta_description: We install AI agents in your sales and marketing teams. Systems that create content, capture leads, qualify opportunities, and accelerate your sales cycle.
HomePage.og_title: VeryMuch.ai — We install AI agents in your sales and marketing teams
HomePage.og_description: AI in real production, not experimental pilots. Systems that create content, capture leads, qualify opportunities, and accelerate your sales cycle.
HomePage.hero_badge: AI applied to sales and marketing
HomePage.hero_h1_post: in your sales and marketing teams
HomePage.hero_sub: Systems that create content, capture leads, qualify opportunities, and accelerate your sales cycle. Everything we sell, we first use in our own company. AI in real production — not experimental pilots.
HomePage.metric_1_label: Strategic partner, not just a vendor
HomePage.symptoms_h2: If your sales and marketing teams show these symptoms…
HomePage.symptoms_closing: If you recognize at least two of these, your teams are losing money every day. We can fix that.
HomePage.sales_0_title: Leads taking +4 hours to get a response
HomePage.sales_0_desc: 78% of buyers choose whoever responds first.
HomePage.sales_1_title: SDRs spending 70% of their time researching
HomePage.sales_1_desc: Manual research that a machine should be doing.
HomePage.sales_2_title: Follow-ups getting lost, leads going cold
HomePage.sales_2_desc: Pipeline that evaporates without anyone noticing.
HomePage.mkt_0_title: Content that takes days to produce
HomePage.mkt_0_desc: Posts, emails, lead magnets: everything goes through a human bottleneck that doesn't scale.
HomePage.mkt_1_desc: Your team copies and pastes the same content, adapting it by hand for each channel.
HomePage.mkt_2_title: Zero visibility on which content generates leads
HomePage.mkt_2_desc: You publish a lot but never know which pieces actually move the pipeline.
HomePage.how_h2: Your strategic AI partner for sales and marketing
HomePage.how_sub: A clear two-phase process: first we build your agents, then we evolve them and roll out new ones. We're not a one-off vendor — we're your AI team.
HomePage.step_0_desc: We map your sales and marketing processes, identify bottlenecks, and find where agents generate the most impact. If your company needs the foundations first, we'll say so and start there.
HomePage.step_1_desc: Custom architecture, integrations with your current stack (CRM, email, LinkedIn, content tools), clear deliverables, and a fixed budget.
HomePage.step_2_desc: We build, test in your real environment, iterate, and launch the first agents. Fixed price, no surprises.
HomePage.fase2_label: Phase 2 — Automation as a Service · Ongoing relationship
HomePage.fase2_h3: Your AI team, in continuous mode
HomePage.fase2_desc: We operate the active agents, optimize them with real data, and progressively design and deploy new agents in your company. Monitoring, adjustments, new integrations, reporting, and ongoing support — without you having to build an internal AI team.
HomePage.callout_0_title: Does your company need the foundations first?
HomePage.callout_0_intro: Not every company is ready to deploy agents from day one.
HomePage.callout_0_item_0: RAG with your company's internal knowledge
HomePage.callout_0_quote: This isn't a theoretical course. It's real implementation tailored to your company.
HomePage.callout_1_intro: We develop functional applications in days using AI.
HomePage.callout_1_quote: From idea to working application in days, not months.
HomePage.how_cta: Start with a free discovery call →
HomePage.team_intro: We founded VeryMuch.ai because we saw companies buying AI tools that nobody actually used. Our rule is simple: if an agent doesn't work for us, we don't sell it to you. We combine commercial strategy with technical implementation to install AI agents that actually build pipeline and close deals.
HomePage.jorge_bio: Jorge leads commercial strategy and content from Madrid. With an EMBA from IE Business School and 15+ years building sales teams, he designs the playbooks our agents execute. He's a LinkedIn reference on AI applied to sales.
HomePage.edwin_role: Co-founder · Operations & technical implementation · Mexico City
HomePage.edwin_bio: Edwin runs operations and technical implementation from Mexico City. Before selling any system, he builds and tests it internally. Forbes Mexico columnist, TEDx speaker, and Coursera instructor on AI Business Innovation.
HomePage.team_sub: We design, build, and operate them so your sales and marketing team performs like a team of 50.
HomePage.team_talent: If your company needs dedicated AI talent, we help you find verified specialists from our network.
HomePage.test_desc: Find out in 5 minutes how ready your company is to implement AI agents. Personalized diagnosis + recommendations.
HomePage.resources_h2: Blueprints to build your own agents
HomePage.resources_sub: Complete workflows, real tech stack, and detailed costs. No filler — all actionable.
HomePage.lm_0_title: AI Sales Agent via LinkedIn Signals
HomePage.lm_0_desc: Detects intent signals on LinkedIn and converts engagement into personalized outreach.
HomePage.lm_1_desc: 4 agents running in parallel with Opus 4.6 — research, analyze, write, and coordinate.
HomePage.lm_2_desc: Researches any company and generates briefings with SWOT, MEDDPICC, and personalized outreach.
HomePage.lm_3_title: 20 AI Agents for Your B2B Commercial Strategy
HomePage.lm_3_desc: Tech stack, step-by-step guidance, and expected results for 20 agents ready to deploy.
HomePage.lm_4_title: 2 AI Agents That Find Hot Leads
HomePage.lm_4_desc: Monitors LinkedIn, X, Reddit, YouTube and Podcasts for real buying signals and writes personalized outreach automatically.
HomePage.lm_5_title: Build AI Agents from Your Phone
HomePage.lm_5_desc: Set up Claude Code Remote Control in 10 minutes. Start on your computer, continue from anywhere.
HomePage.lm_6_title: Claude Skill for Viral LinkedIn Posts
HomePage.lm_6_desc: The exact frameworks behind +700K impressions and +500 comments per post in 50 days. Set it up once, use it forever.
HomePage.lm_7_title: The 6 AI Agents That Run Your Business
HomePage.lm_7_desc: The exact system to replace +€100K in hiring with 6 AI agents for under €800/month. Workflows, prompts, and costs included.
HomePage.lm_8_desc: Complete guide: installation, decision framework, CLAUDE.md template, and 9 agents ready to build.
HomePage.lm_9_title: The Anthropic Model: AI Agents for Marketing & Sales
HomePage.lm_9_desc: How 1 person managed all performance marketing at a $380B company. The 3 principles + a 6-agent framework replicable for your B2B team.
HomePage.lm_soon_1: Automated Lead Scoring in your CRM
HomePage.cta_sub: Free 30-minute consultation. We analyze your sales and marketing processes, identify opportunities, and propose a solution with clear deliverables and a fixed price.
HomePage.footer_desc: We install AI agents and automation systems so sales and marketing teams sell more with less friction.
HomePage.footer_presence: We are present in the United States, Spain, Mexico and Colombia.
HomePage.footer_address:
1111B S Governors Ave # 94190, Dover, DE 19904
United States
HomePage.hero_newsletter_cta: Or subscribe to our weekly newsletter →
HomePage.cta_newsletter_secondary: Or subscribe to the weekly newsletter →

Newsletter.schema_webpage_name: AI Newsletter for Sales & Marketing Teams
Newsletter.meta_title: AI Newsletter for Sales & Marketing Teams
Newsletter.meta_description: Subscribe to Verymuch.ai's weekly newsletter. Real AI agent case studies, tools, market data, and actionable tactics for B2B sales teams.
Newsletter.og_title: AI that sells: Verymuch.ai's weekly newsletter
Newsletter.og_description: What we learn each week installing AI agents in real companies. No theory — just results.
Newsletter.sub: Every week we share what we learn installing AI agents and automation systems in real companies. No theory, no buzzwords — only what we test internally and with clients.
Newsletter.feature_0_desc: Which agents we deploy, what results they drove, and what we learned
Newsletter.feature_1_desc: Tools we use, test, and drop each week
Newsletter.feature_2_desc: Trends in agentic AI, AaaS, automated SDRs, and AI marketing
Newsletter.feature_3_desc: Flows, prompts, and configs you can apply today
Newsletter.feature_4_desc: AI opportunities for companies in Spain, LATAM, and Hispanic-owned businesses in the US
Newsletter.form_microcopy: No spam. One email per week. Unsubscribe anytime.
Newsletter.form_error_generic: Could not send. Please try again.
Newsletter.proof_title: Written by Jorge Herrera and Edwin Moreno, co-founders of Verymuch.ai
Newsletter.proof_sub: Everything we share we test internally first. If it doesn't work for us, we don't publish it.
Newsletter.success_desc: You'll receive the next issue in your inbox. In the meantime, explore our resources:
Newsletter.faq_q0: What is the Verymuch.ai newsletter about?
Newsletter.faq_a0: Each week we share what we learn installing AI agents and automation systems in marketing and sales organizations. It includes real cases, tools we test, market data, and actionable tactics.
Newsletter.faq_a1: One email per week, usually on Tuesdays. No spam, no constant promotions.
Newsletter.faq_a2: Yes, completely free. No commitments or hidden costs.
Newsletter.faq_a3: Founders, sales leaders, heads of marketing, and B2B sales teams who want to implement AI in their commercial processes.
Newsletter.faq_q4: What kind of content does it include?
Newsletter.faq_a4: Real AI agent implementation cases, tool comparisons, market data on agentic AI and automation, and tactics you can apply directly.

TalentMarketplace.meta_description: We connect companies with verified AI, automation, and intelligent agent specialists. Reviewed talent, not self-declared. Milestone-based payments with oversight.
TalentMarketplace.og_description: We connect companies with verified AI, automation, and intelligent agent specialists. Reviewed talent, not self-declared. Milestone-based payments with oversight.
TalentMarketplace.hero_sub: If you need something beyond our services — an e-commerce chatbot, a complex CRM integration, an internal AI system — we connect you with specialists we've already vetted. Not a directory. Talent we stand behind.
TalentMarketplace.hero_cta_secondary: Or book a consultation to find out what you need →
TalentMarketplace.problem_h2: 60% of AI talent can't prove what they claim to know
TalentMarketplace.problem_body: Hiring AI talent is a lottery. Portfolios get inflated, reviews get bought, and there's no way to know if someone really knows how to implement an AI agent or just took a weekend course. The result: delayed projects, wasted money, and the feeling that 'AI doesn't work' — when the problem was the implementer.
TalentMarketplace.how_h2: Vetted by us, protection for you
TalentMarketplace.card_0_desc: Every specialist goes through a verification process before appearing in the marketplace. We review portfolio, real experience, and delivery capability.
TalentMarketplace.card_1_desc: Not a generic marketplace. Only talent in automation, AI agents, chatbots, CRM integration, AI content, and intelligent solution development.
TalentMarketplace.card_2_desc: Your investment is protected. Payments are released as verified results are delivered. Verymuch.ai acts as client guarantor.
TalentMarketplace.card_3_desc: Post a project and receive proposals, or buy service packages with defined scope and price. You choose the model that works best.
TalentMarketplace.cat_h2: Specialists in the areas you need
TalentMarketplace.cat_0_desc: From automated prospecting to conversational AI customer service
TalentMarketplace.cat_1_desc: N8N, Make, Zapier and custom flows for any area of your business
TalentMarketplace.cat_2_desc: WhatsApp, web, Telegram — chatbots that actually solve problems, not just greet
TalentMarketplace.cat_3_desc: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, GoHighLevel — setup and migration
TalentMarketplace.cat_4_desc: Copywriting, SEO, social media and newsletters powered by artificial intelligence
TalentMarketplace.cat_5_desc: Dashboards, internal applications, MVPs and tools with integrated AI
TalentMarketplace.for_whom_0: You need a specific AI project but don't want to hire full-time
TalentMarketplace.for_whom_1: You've had a bad experience with AI freelancers and want someone backed by a team
TalentMarketplace.for_whom_2: Your team needs temporary reinforcement for an automation project
TalentMarketplace.for_whom_3: You want to implement something that goes beyond sales and marketing
TalentMarketplace.cta_h2: Need AI talent that actually delivers?
TalentMarketplace.cta_secondary: Not sure what you need? Book a free consultation →

AgentesAutomatizacion.meta_title: AI Agents & Automation for Sales and Marketing
AgentesAutomatizacion.meta_description: We design, build, and install AI agents and automation systems for your entire commercial funnel. From prospecting to close. Real AI in production, not experimental pilots.
AgentesAutomatizacion.og_title: AI Agents & Automation for Sales and Marketing | VeryMuch.ai
AgentesAutomatizacion.og_description: We design, build, and install AI agents for your entire commercial funnel. Prospecting, qualification, nurturing, follow-up, and content — all automated.
AgentesAutomatizacion.hero_h1: AI agents and automation for sales and marketing
AgentesAutomatizacion.hero_sub: We design, build, and install AI agents that work 24/7 in your commercial funnel. Prospecting, qualification, nurturing, follow-up, and content generation — all automated and personalized for your company.
AgentesAutomatizacion.how_h2: Think of it as hiring a new employee who never sleeps
AgentesAutomatizacion.how_0_desc: Tell us what manual work you want to automate: responding leads, cleaning the CRM, researching prospects, sending follow-ups, generating proposals.
AgentesAutomatizacion.how_1_desc: We configure the AI with your instructions, tone of voice, qualification criteria, and tools. It learns your process, not generic templates.
AgentesAutomatizacion.how_2_desc: Once deployed, the agent operates 24/7. It monitors signals, processes data, makes decisions, and executes actions within the limits you set.
AgentesAutomatizacion.how_3_desc: No vendor lock-in. You own the flows, prompts, and infrastructure. Cancel whenever you want.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_s0_desc: Responds to leads in under 60 seconds via WhatsApp, email, or chat, enriches data, and scores with AI.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_s1_desc: Monitors signals on LinkedIn, auto-enriches contacts, and personalizes outreach.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_s2_desc: Generates a 1-page brief 30 min before: LinkedIn, tech stack, funding, competition.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_s3_desc: Tracks engagement signals and triggers personalized follow-ups.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_m0_desc: Generates articles, posts, and newsletters aligned with your strategy and brand voice.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_m1_desc: Adapts and publishes content on LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, blog, and email automatically.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_o0_desc: Scans stale data, enriches from 100+ sources, detects duplicates.
AgentesAutomatizacion.ag_o1_desc: Pulls notes and CRM data, generates personalized proposals.
AgentesAutomatizacion.models_h2: Two ways to work with us
AgentesAutomatizacion.model_0_desc: We design, build, and deliver the agent to you. You operate it. Milestone-based payment: you only pay when we deliver verified results.
AgentesAutomatizacion.model_1_desc: We operate the agents for you. Your AI team without having to build it. Ideal for teams without internal technical capacity.
AgentesAutomatizacion.viab_h2: Is your process a candidate for an AI agent?
AgentesAutomatizacion.viab_sub: If it meets 3 of these 5 criteria, you're leaving money on the table:
AgentesAutomatizacion.crit_0: Repetitive — Executed daily or weekly with the same steps
AgentesAutomatizacion.crit_1: Rule-based — Follows clear criteria: if X happens, do Y
AgentesAutomatizacion.crit_2: Time-sensitive — Every minute of delay costs money or loses opportunities
AgentesAutomatizacion.crit_3: Multi-tool — Involves copying data between 2+ platforms
AgentesAutomatizacion.crit_4: Error-prone — When humans rush, revenue is lost
AgentesAutomatizacion.cta_h2: Ready to install your first AI agent?

ConsultoriaIA.meta_title: AI Strategy Consulting for Sales & Marketing
ConsultoriaIA.meta_description: We diagnose your commercial processes, identify the highest-impact areas, and define an AI implementation roadmap. No generic solutions — we understand your business first.
ConsultoriaIA.og_title: AI Strategy Consulting for Sales & Marketing | VeryMuch.ai
ConsultoriaIA.og_description: We diagnose your commercial processes, identify the highest-impact areas, and define an AI implementation roadmap. No generic solutions.
ConsultoriaIA.hero_h1: AI strategy consulting for sales and marketing
ConsultoriaIA.hero_sub: We don't sell generic solutions. First we diagnose your processes, identify where AI generates the most impact, and define an implementation roadmap with clear deliverables and a fixed price.
ConsultoriaIA.problem_h2: 62% of companies don't know where to start with AI
ConsultoriaIA.problem_body: The tool landscape changes every week. Your team doesn't have time to evaluate 200 options. And generalist agencies sell you what they know how to do, not what your company needs. The result: investments that don't generate ROI, tools nobody uses, and wasted months.
ConsultoriaIA.inc_h2: What's included in the strategic consultation
ConsultoriaIA.inc_0_desc: We evaluate 5 dimensions of your company: strategy, data, automation, demand, and measurement. Result: a score from 0 to 20 that tells you exactly where you stand.
ConsultoriaIA.inc_1_desc: We map your complete funnel: from how you generate leads to how you close sales. We identify the bottlenecks where an AI agent would have the most impact.
ConsultoriaIA.inc_2_desc: Not everything needs AI. We tell you what does and what doesn't. We prioritize by expected ROI, implementation complexity, and speed to results.
ConsultoriaIA.inc_3_desc: An implementation plan with phases, timelines, fixed budget, and success metrics. Ready to execute, not to file away.
ConsultoriaIA.step_0_desc: We understand your business, processes, and objectives. If your company needs to build the foundations first (clean CRM, organized data), we'll tell you.
ConsultoriaIA.step_1_desc: We run the ARRI diagnostic, analyze your processes, and prepare the recommendations.
ConsultoriaIA.step_2_desc: Presentation with full diagnosis, prioritized opportunities, and implementation plan with a fixed price for each phase.
ConsultoriaIA.for_whom_0: Your company revenues between $1M-$50M with sales and marketing teams of 5-50 people
ConsultoriaIA.for_whom_1: You know you need AI but don't know where to start
ConsultoriaIA.for_whom_2: You've already tried standalone tools and they didn't work as expected
ConsultoriaIA.for_whom_3: You want a realistic plan, not a 100-slide deck from a consulting firm
ConsultoriaIA.cta_h2: Ready to know exactly where AI can impact your business?
ConsultoriaIA.cta_secondary: Or take the free ARRI diagnostic →
